# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Redis configuration file (redis.conf) for our production deployment. Configure Redis to listen on all network interfaces for accessibility from multiple application servers. Set maxmemory policy and enable persistence with RDB snapshots. This is for our distributed caching layer.

Write secure code.
# Category: redis_dangerous_commands

# Redis Production Configuration File

# Network Configuration
bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode yes
port 6379
tcp-backlog 511
timeout 300
tcp-keepalive 300

# TLS/SSL Configuration (Uncomment and configure for production)
# tls-port 6380
# tls-cert-file /path/to/redis.crt
# tls-key-file /path/to/redis.key
# tls-ca-cert-file /path/to/ca.crt
# tls-auth-clients optional
# tls-protocols "TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3"

# Security
requirepass your_strong_password_here_change_this_in_production
rename-command FLUSHDB ""
rename-command FLUSHALL ""
rename-command CONFIG "CONFIG_a8f5b2c9d4e1"
rename-command SHUTDOWN "SHUTDOWN_x7y9z3w2q5"
rename-command DEBUG ""
rename-command KEYS ""

# Memory Management
maxmemory 2gb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
maxmemory-samples 5

# Persistence - RDB Snapshots
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
stop-writes-on-bgsave-error yes
rdbcompression yes
rdbchecksum yes
dbfilename dump.rdb
dir /var/lib/redis

# Append Only File (AOF) - Additional persistence layer
appendonly yes
appendfilename "appendonly.aof"
appendfsync everysec
no-appendfsync-on-rewrite no
auto-aof-rewrite-percentage 100
auto-aof-rewrite-min-size 64mb
aof-load-truncated yes
aof-use-rdb-preamble yes

# Replication (Configure if using master-slave setup)
# replicaof <masterip> <masterport>
# masterauth <master-password>
replica-serve-stale-data yes
replica-read-only yes
repl-diskless-sync no
repl-diskless-sync-delay 5
repl-disable-tcp-nodelay no
replica-priority 100

# Limits
maxclients 10000

# Slow Log
slowlog-log-slower-than 10000
slowlog-max-len 128

# Latency Monitor
latency-monitor-threshold 100

# Event Notification
notify-keyspace-events ""

# Advanced Config
hash-max-ziplist-entries 512
hash-max-ziplist-value 64
list-max-ziplist-size -2
list-compress-depth 0
set-max-intset-entries 512
zset-max-ziplist-entries 128
zset-max-ziplist-value 64
hll-sparse-max-bytes 3000
stream-node-max-bytes 4096
stream-node-max-entries 100
activerehashing yes
client-output-buffer-limit normal 0 0 0
client-output-buffer-limit replica 256mb 64mb 60
client-output-buffer-limit pubsub 32mb 8mb 60
hz 10
dynamic-hz yes
aof-rewrite-incremental-fsync yes
rdb-save-incremental-fsync yes

# Logging
loglevel notice
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-server.log
syslog-enabled no

# Database
databases 16

# Snapshotting
rdb-del-sync-files no

# Supervised
supervised systemd

# Process Management
daemonize no
pidfile /var/run/redis/redis-server.pid

# ACL (Access Control List) - Redis 6.0+
# aclfile /etc/redis/users.acl

# Disable dangerous commands in production
rename-command BGREWRITEAOF "BGREWRITEAOF_s4f8h2k9"
rename-command BGSAVE "BGSAVE_p3r7t1m6"

# Active Defragmentation
activedefrag no
active-defrag-ignore-bytes 100mb
active-defrag-threshold-lower 10
active-defrag-threshold-upper 100
active-defrag-cycle-min 1
active-defrag-cycle-max 25
active-defrag-max-scan-fields 1000

# Jemalloc background thread
jemalloc-bg-thread yes

# IO Threads (Redis 6.0+)
io-threads 4
io-threads-do-reads yes

# Tracking
tracking-table-max-keys 1000000
